issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Must specify: (1) look at 5 cards from top of deck, (2) reveal up to 1 Foxy Pirates type card, (3) add to hand, (4) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only searches for name; does not capture the 'look at 5' and 'place rest at bottom' sequence.
PlayFromHand filter incomplete. Must specify: purple Character with 4000 power or less. Current filter missing 'maxPower' constraint (should be 4000).
Cost notation missing. DSL does not reflect DON!! −1 cost. While OnPlay trigger captures activation, cost structure (GiveDon −1 or similar mechanism) not represented.
